title: LightWorlds
description: A lightweight world managment system and alternative to multiverse core
body:
![Title: Lightworlds](https://i.ibb.co/cxfmQhC/Logo.png)

If you search for a good alternative to MultiverseCore then you found it. LightWorlds has everything you need.

Discord for free help: https://discord.gg/QT77NYWtcV

![Title: Commands and Permissions](https://i.ibb.co/9hHfNW6/commandsandpermission.png)

- /lw - lightworlds.help
- /lw teleport or /lw tp - lightworlds.teleport
- /lw create - lightworlds.create
- /lw delete - lightworlds.delete
- /lw list - lightworlds.list
- /lw players - lightworlds.players
- /lw info - lightworlds.info

![Title: Arguments and Descriptions](https://i.ibb.co/KV7pxtL/argsdes.png)

- /lw: shows a overview of all commands
- /lw teleport or /lw tp [WorldName] [(Optional) PlayerName] [(Optional) -c X Y Z Yaw Pitch]: teleport you or an other player to the destinated worlds spawn or to the given coordinates
- /lw create [WorldName] [WorldType] [(Optional) -s Seed] [(Optional) -g Generator]: create a World with the given world type, generator or seed
- /lw delete [WorldName]: delete the given world
- /lw list - lightworlds.list: shows a list of all existing worlds
- /lw players [(Optional) WorldName]: shows an overview of the playercount of all worlds or shows all players in a world if a world is specified
- /lw info: shows wich world you are in

![Title: Why use Lightworlds](https://i.ibb.co/gVXfkD6/whyuselightworlds.png)

- Simple and easy to use Commands
- Tabcompletion for every Command
-Inbuild Void Generator
-Free Support on the LightWorlds
- Doens`t override vanilla meschanics
- Free Support on our Discord https://discord.gg/QT77NYWtcV
- Open Source Project on Github for every Developer free to use https://github.com/justin0-0/LightWorlds
-Tutorial: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WfEWm_Q_ACQ&t=1s
